expectations.evidence: Nodes phase-1, phase-2, phase-3 all type wf-phase
bundle-analyst-1, bundle-creative-thinker-1 (phase-1), bundle-strategist-1, bundle-devils-advocate-1 (phase-2), bundle-moderator-1, bundle-synthesizer-1 (phase-3)

expectations.text: All agent nodes have parent_id (not container) set
expectations.evidence: Uses 'container' field instead of 'parent_id'. E.g., "container": "phase-1" instead of "parent_id": "phase-1"

expectations.text: Agent nodes use correct bundle_id field
expectations.evidence: Uses 'agent_bundle_id' instead of 'bundle_id'. E.g., "agent_bundle_id": "bundle-analyst" instead of "bundle_id": "bundle-analyst"

expectations.text: Has termination_conditions with max_rounds and consensus_reached
No unnecessary placeholders for concrete bundles
expectations.evidence: Has 6 unnecessary placeholders for bundle references despite bundles being concrete filesystem modules
